description: Classic brick breaker with paddle, ball physics, colored brick rows, score tracking, and lives system
prompt: Build a Breakout arcade game with HTML5 canvas. Paddle at the bottom controlled by mouse and arrow keys. Ball bounces off paddle and walls, destroys colored bricks arranged in rows. Multiple brick colors with different point values. Score tracking, 3 lives, game over and restart flow. Responsive canvas scaling.

tasks.subject: Create game loop, paddle, ball, and physics
Create brick grid and collision detection
